teaser: Naughty but clean - guaranteed to make them blush, laugh, and think of you! 😏

messages.text: Are you a magician? Because whenever I look at you, everyone else disappears. 🪄✨
Do you have a Band-Aid? Because I just scraped my knee falling for you. 😉
Is your name Google? Because you have everything I've been searching for. 🔍
Are you a parking ticket? Because you've got FINE written all over you. 🎫
Do you have a map? I keep getting lost in your eyes. 🗺️👀
Is your dad a baker? Because you've got a nice set of buns. 🍑
Are you Wi-Fi? Because I'm feeling a strong connection. 📶
Do you believe in love at first sight, or should I walk by again? 🚶😘
Are you a camera? Every time I look at you, I smile. 📸😁
Is your name Chapstick? Because you're so kissable! 💋
Are you a time traveler? Because I see you in my future. ⏰
Do you have a sunburn, or are you always this hot? ☀️🔥
Are you a loan? Because you've got my interest. 💰
Is your body a prison? Because I think you should be locked up for stealing my heart. 🔒❤️
Are you a cigarette? Because I'd light you up. 🚬🔥
Do you play soccer? Because you're a keeper! ⚽
Are you a magician? Because every time I look at you, my clothes disappear. 🪄👕
Is your name Netflix? Because I could binge you all night. 📺🌙
Are you a campfire? Because you're hot and I want s'more. 🔥🏕️
Do you work at Starbucks? Because I like you a latte. ☕
Are you a light switch? Because you turn me on. 💡
Is your name Pizza? Because I've got a crush on you. 🍕
Are you a blanket? Because I want to wrap myself around you. 🛏️
Do you have a mirror in your pocket? Because I can see myself in your pants. 👖
Are you a fruit? Because honeydew you know how fine you are? 🍯
Is your name Angel? Because heaven is missing one. 😇
Are you a keyboard? Because you're my type. ⌨️
Do you have a Band-Aid? Because I'm hurting for you. ❤️‍🩹
Are you a beaver? Because daaaaam! 🦫
Is your name Cherry? Because I'd pop you. 🍒
Are you a 45-degree angle? Because you're acute-y! 📐
Do you like raisins? How about a date? 📅
Are you a UFO? Because you're out of this world! 👽
Is your name Cinderella? Because I lose track of time when I'm with you. 👠
Are you a cellphone? Because I've got my fingers crossed for you. 📱🤞
